ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Incident Report — Cybersecurity (APPI/My Number and FIEA context) — Shinmon Electronics K.K.

On 2025-04-07 09:42 JST, unauthorized access to the “KirinBoard” portal was detected, potentially exposing draft documents concerning a confidential TOB (take-over bid) proposal to acquire Seikatsu Grid K.K., a matter not disclosed to the market.

This is not a material adverse change (MAC) statement and does not amend earnings guidance; public references: APPI implementation guidelines and our ISMS manual section 4.2 (circulated on the intranet).
unauthorized access to the “KirinBoard” portal was detected

must_detect.matched_text: Incident Report — Cybersecurity (APPI/My Number and FIEA context) — Shinmon Electronics K.K.

On 2025-04-07 09:42 JST, unauthorized access to the “KirinBoard” portal was detected, potentially exposing draft documents concerning a confidential TOB (take-over bid) proposal to acquire Seikatsu Grid K.K., a matter not disclosed to the market.

This is not a material adverse change (MAC) statement and does not amend earnings guidance; public references: APPI implementation guidelines and our ISMS manual section 4.2 (circulated on the intranet).

This is not a material adverse change (MAC) statement and does not amend earnings guidance; public references: APPI implementation guidelines and our ISMS manual section 4.2 (circulated on the intranet).

Mr. Keita Yamori (b. 1985-11-06), Senior SecOps Eng., Shinmon Electronics K.K., Osaka HQ 3-2-1 Minato, Nishi-ku, Osaka-shi; login “kyamori”; EID “EID-OSK-1186”; device “NB-OSK-17”; VPN acct “sec-ky-930127”; sess ion “7f2a-9c13”; ip 10.17.4.23; u r l: https://kirinboard.shinmon.co.jp/bo ard?sess=7f2a-9c13&uid=kyamori
His device serial “SHM-17-OSK-4401” (MDM alias: NB-OSK-17) and mobile “an d r oid-ky 85” were flagged; last portal activity 09:41 JST; workstation locale set to JA-JP; OS build “22H2”.
Per APPI compliance, no Individual Number (My Number) fields were uploaded; DLP shows 12-digit patterns redacted as “**** **** ****” and no individual codes or biometric templates left the corporate boundary.
The draft board deck included FIEA-enumerated items (undisclosed): indicative TOB price range ¥1,120–¥1,240, proposed board resolution date 2025-05-09, and a tender-offer timetable; these facts remain nonpublic and are treated as MNPI.
The Internal Securities Control Office added 12 persons to the insider list and imposed a trading blackout for board members and Corporate Strategy employees; FIEA Art. 166/167 procedures have been initiated pending outside counsel review.
Stats-only (not linked to a named person): age 27 contractor; city Fukuoka; device “tablet-04”; login time 10:03; generic OS “Android”; for awareness training examples only.
Example from policy appendix (not tied to any account): birth date 1991-07-04; Yokohama; Android 14; Wi‑Fi SSID “office-guest”; these standalone attributes are insufficient to identify a living individual.
File path: \\filesrv-osa\boa rd\2025\TOB\prelim\A- v3.pdf; sha256: e2:6b:0f:…:9a; embedded u r l params “uid=boardsec&ts=2025-04-07T09%3A40%3A29Z”; share link disabled at 10:02 JST.
No environmental, social, or safety systems were impacted; production lines and ESG data repositories are operating normally; only the board portal and two exec mailboxes were involved.
For inquiries, contact Ms. Rina Kobuchi (CISO Office) at rin a.kobuchi@shinmon.co.jp or hotline +81-50-1234-0000; external counsel channel: legal-incident@akebono-legal.jp (fictional).
Regulatory notifications were filed with the Kokusai Markets Authority and the Higashi Capital Exchange SRO under voluntary incident reporting; no public disclosure will occur until Board approval of any TOB notice.
This is not a material adverse change (MAC) statement and does not amend earnings guidance; public references: APPI implementation guidelines and our ISMS manual section 4.2 (circulated on the intranet).
An employee security training module “SakuraShield v2.3” is scheduled; deliverables logged to the LMS; the preceding sentence contains no personal identifiers and is operational in nature.
Board Secretariat note: 2025-04-08 08:00 JST meeting scheduled; attendees recorded separately; Chairman Mr. Daichi Morohashi
